Consent.message: We use analytics cookies to understand how Ticketwaze is used. They stay off until you accept.

Metadata.title: Sell more tickets with less effort | Ticketwaze
Metadata.description: Everything businesses need to create activities, sell tickets, manage teams, and track performance — online and offline.

layout.title: Sell more tickets with less effort
layout.description: Everything businesses need to create activities, sell tickets, manage teams, and track performance.

onboarding.title: Your Invitations
onboarding.description: Here you can find all your invitations to join organizations on Ticketwaze — choose which ones you’d like to accept or decline with ease.
onboarding.description2: Create activities, manage attendees, and track sales — everything starts here
onboarding.alert: We’ve noticed that you are not currently part of any organisation. By continuing, you agree to create a new organisation under your name, where you will be assigned as the administrator. This will allow you to start selling tickets, managing activities, and collaborating with your team.
onboarding.alert2: Before you can access your organisation dashboard, you'll need to complete a quick setup to configure your individual Ticketwaze account. You'll be asked a few questions to personalize your experience and establish your organisation's preferences.
onboarding.alert3: By proceeding, you acknowledge that you have read and agree to our Terms of Use, Seller Agreement, and Privacy Policy. These documents outline your responsibilities as an organisation, including refund policies, payout terms, and platform fees.

errors.name: Please enter your organisation name.
errors.service: Please select at least one service.
errors.referral: Please let us know how you heard about us.

organisations.title: Welcome to Ticketwaze
organisations.description: Best for a platform that handles business and enterprise users
organisations.setup: Let's set up your Ticketwaze workspace

last.1: Thank you for completing the setup. Your organisation profile will be configured based on your selected services, team structure, and preferences. You can now begin creating activities, managing bookings, and inviting team members to collaborate.
last.2: Important: We will now redirect you to the organisation dashboard. For security purposes, you will be required to log in again using your freshly created Ticketwaze account credentials before accessing your dashboard.
last.3: Please note: Ticketwaze does not share your organisation's data or sales information with third parties without your explicit consent. Payouts will be processed according to your need, subject to verification and applicable processing timelines. You can review or update your organisation settings, and team roles at any time from your dashboard.

4.1: By proceeding, you acknowledge that you have read and agree to our
4.2: Terms of Use and Privacy Policy
4.3: . If you have any questions or concerns, please reach out to our support team via the

last.5: By proceeding, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Terms of Use, Seller Agreement, and Privacy Policy. These documents outline your responsibilities as an organiser, including refund policies, payout terms, and platform fees. If you have any questions or concerns, please reach out to our seller support team via the Help Center or email us at organisations@ticketwaze.com.

Analytics.upgradeAlert: You’re currently on the Free plan, which includes only basic analytics. To unlock advanced insights and see more detailed analytics, please upgrade your membership.

Finance.title: Finance
Finance.noPinWarning: For your security and to ensure smooth processing of your transactions, a Withdrawal PIN must be created before any withdrawal request can be initiated. This PIN serves as an additional layer of protection, safeguarding your account against unauthorized access. Please take a moment to set up your Withdrawal PIN now. Once established, you will be able to proceed confidently with your withdrawal requests, knowing that your funds are protected by enhanced security measures.
Finance.noBankingInfo: We are unable to process your request because required banking information is missing from your account profile. To ensure successful transactions and compliance with security standards, please update your banking details. Once all mandatory information has been provided, you will be able to proceed with your withdrawal or other account activities.
Finance.pendingAlert: Please note that you may only withdraw funds from your Available Balance. Any Pending Balance displayed in your account remains under processing and still belongs to the organization until all necessary verifications and clearances are completed. Once the pending transactions are fully processed, the funds will be transferred into your Available Balance, at which point they can be withdrawn.
Finance.payment_method_hint: Choose how you'd like to receive your funds
Finance.bank_hint: Direct transfer to your bank account
Finance.moncash_hint: Withdraw directly to your MonCash account
Finance.moncash_details_hint: Enter the MonCash phone number to receive your funds
Finance.saveMoncashInfo_hint: Keep this number saved for your next withdrawal
Finance.amount_hint: Your full available balance will be withdrawn. For a bank transfer, choose the currency you'd like to receive.
Finance.withdraw_all_note: Partial withdrawals aren't supported — the entire available balance is withdrawn at once.
Finance.bank_details_hint: Enter your bank account details for the transfer
Finance.incorrectInfoWarning: Please double-check your account details. If the information entered is incorrect, the transfer will fail and your withdrawal may be delayed.
Finance.saveBankInfo_hint: Keep these details saved for your next withdrawal
Finance.security_hint: Enter your withdrawal PIN to confirm this transaction
Finance.accountTypeError: Please select an account to perform withdrawal

errors.noPinConfirmation: Please enter a valid Pin confirmation
errors.pinNotSame: Pin and Pin confirmation should be the same
errors.incorrectPin: The Withdrawal PIN you entered is incorrect. Please try again.
errors.Unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action. For your security, access is restricted to authorized users only. If you believe this is an error, please contact customer support for assistance.
errors.insufficient: Your Available Balance is insufficient to complete this withdrawal request. Please ensure that you have enough funds in your account before attempting another withdrawal.
errors.invalidAmount: Please enter a valid amount greater than zero
errors.moncash_number_invalid: MonCash number must be exactly 8 digits

Finance.withdrawSuccess: Your withdrawal request has been successfully submitted and is now being processed.

create_event.title: Create Activity
create_event.no_result: They is no result for the keyword
create_event.proFeature: Private activity creation is part of our Pro+ membership. With Pro+, you unlock the ability to keep your activities fully private, giving you greater control and peace of mind over how you manage and share your activities. Upgrading not only grants access to private activity creation, but also ensures you enjoy the full suite of advanced features designed to make your experience smoother, more secure, and more personalized. If privacy and exclusivity matter to you, Pro+ is the membership tier that delivers.

tagTip.title: Tip
tagTip.description: Hashtags help people discover your activity more easily. By adding relevant hashtags, you make it easier for users to find your event when they search or explore similar activities on the platform. Choose keywords that describe your event, theme, location, or audience (for example: #networking, #concert, #haiti)

inPerson.title: In-Person
inPerson.description: Activities with location-based access like festivals, conferences, or meetups.

raffle.title: Raffle
raffle.description: Sell numbered tickets and draw winners for one or more prizes.

meet.title: Google Meet
meet.description: Attend virtually with Google Meet — distance doesn’t matter.
meet.warning: To create a Google Meet event, we’ll use your Google account and request access to your calendar. If you proceed, you agree to grant us permission to access and manage your calendar events through your Google account. Please note that if you remove this access, users will no longer be able to purchase tickets for your Meet events.
meet.fetchFailedError: We couldn’t retrieve the requested data at the moment. Please check your internet connection and try again. If the error persit, reach out support.

private.title: Private Activity
private.description: Exclusive invitation-only activity with restricted access for select guests.

reservations.title: Reservations
reservations.description: Designed for barbershops, restaurants, hostels, cinema, medical services and other service providers.

transportations.title: Transportations
transportations.description: Allows travelers to purchase tickets for scheduled trips between destinations.

tours.title: Tours & experiences
tours.description: Activities such as city tours, cultural visits, outdoor adventures and hands-on experiences.

sports.title: Sports
sports.description: Live sports events and thrilling matches. Allow fans to buy tickets for sporting competitions and games

create_event.tagPlaceholder: Type a hashtag and press enter or spacebar

raffle.title: Create Raffle
raffle.no_org: Session not ready, please try again.
raffle.pro_feature: Raffles are part of our Pro and Premium plans. Upgrade to create numbered-ticket raffles with prizes and an automated draw.
raffle.name: Raffle title
raffle.description_placeholder: Describe the raffle, the prizes and how the draw works.
raffle.unlimited_tip: Leave unlimited, or cap how many tickets can be sold.
raffle.draw_mode_auto_desc: Winners are drawn automatically at the draw date.
raffle.draw_mode_manual_desc: You trigger the draw yourself once sales close.
raffle.prizes_tip: Add one prize per winning rank. Rank 1 is drawn first.
raffle.fairness_note: The draw uses a secure random generator and is recorded so winners can be independently verified.
raffle.lock_note: Once the first ticket is sold, the price, prizes and draw date are locked.
raffle.age_note: Buyers confirm they meet the age requirement and accept the raffle rules before purchase.

errors.name: The raffle title must be at least 10 characters
errors.description: The description must be at least 20 characters
errors.price: Ticket price must be greater than 0
errors.sales_start: A sales start date is required
errors.sales_end: A sales end date is required
errors.sales_window: Sales must end on or before the draw date
errors.total_tickets: Total tickets must be at least the number of prizes

raffle.tags_tip: Add a few tags to describe your raffle. Press Enter, comma or space to add each one. Click a tag to remove it.
raffle.location_tip: Add a pickup or draw location. If you set one, attendees see it on a map; leave it empty to hide the map.

create_event.description: Tell attendees what your activity is about, who's it for, and what they can expect.
create_event.private_tip: Private activities stay listed with a Private tag, but only the guests you add to the attendee list can buy tickets.
create_event.sales_end_at_hint: Optional. After this date and time, tickets can no longer be bought and the event is marked as sales ended. It stays listed and viewable. Leave empty to keep sales open until the event ends.
create_event.general_default: Enjoy full access without any cost! Join us for an unforgettable experience. Secure your spot today!
create_event.meet_default: Join our Meet session with full access! Connect, and enjoy anywhere. Reserve your place today!
create_event.edit_warning_body: By editing this activity, it will be sent for review again. It will not be listed on the app until the review is approved.
create_event.freeTip: When you set an activity as Free, the system will automatically mark it as Refundable. This ensures consistency across all free activities and avoids manual adjustments.

deletion.warning: This schedules the raffle for deletion. During the grace period, entries stay valid; once it lapses, all entries are refunded to buyers' wallets and the raffle is removed.

welcome.title: Welcome to Ticketwaze!
welcome.description: We're excited to have you here. Ticketwaze is built to help you grow your organisation, sell tickets effortlessly, and connect with your audience — all in one place.

activities.title: Create & manage activities
activities.description: Easily create in-person activities, Google Meet sessions and more. Set ticket classes, add performers, apply discount codes, and track attendance in real time.

finance.title: Stay on top of your finances
finance.description: Monitor your revenue, view detailed transaction history, and request withdrawals directly to your bank or MonCash account. Everything you need to manage your earnings is right here.

team.title: Build and manage your team
team.description: Invite collaborators, assign roles, and manage access permissions. Whether it's a co-organiser or a ticket checker, your whole team can work together seamlessly.

profile.title: Set up your organisation profile
profile.description: Head to Organisation Settings to customise your profile — add your logo, a description, your website, and social links. A great profile builds trust with your attendees.

trial.title: Your 14-day Pro trial is active!
trial.description: To help you get the most out of Ticketwaze, we've unlocked a free 14-day Pro trial for your organisation. No credit card needed.
trial.feature1: 14 days of full Pro access — completely free
trial.feature2: Advanced analytics to track sales & audience
trial.feature3: Up to 300 free tickets per activity & custom types

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: User Information
account.profileAlert: Please sign in to your user dashboard to view or update the information linked to your profile. Once signed in, you’ll be able to review your details and make any necessary changes directly from your dashboard.
account.2faTip: Two‑factor authentication (2FA) cannot be disabled because your account is either the owner of, or belongs to, an organization. For security and compliance reasons, organization accounts must always keep 2FA enabled.

errors.phoneNumber: Phone Number should be at least 8 characters

team.noSelfDelete: You cannot remove yourself from your organisation. If you don't want to be part of this organisation, transfert the ownership or delete the organisation.
team.noSelfChange: You have to transfert the ownership of the organisation before changing your role. If you don't want to be part of this organisation, transfert the ownership or delete the organisation.
team.confirm_text: Are you sure you want to remove this member? They will lose all access to this organization.
team.confirm_transfert: Transferring ownership will give new owner full control of this organisation on Ticketwaze. You will lose administrative access and cannot undo this action.
team.requiresAccount: The person you're inviting must already have a Ticketwaze account.

security.passwordTip: After updating your password, you'll need to sign in again on all you devices for security puposes.
